title: galeomma
intro: Galeomma, also known as Galeopsis or hemp nettle, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Galeomma include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as a diuretic, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Galeomma include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
